data.title: Visa Partners With Analytic Partners To Unlock Smarter Marketing For US Merchants
data.description: Visa partners with Analytic Partners to optimize advertising returns using AI-driven data analytics. Initial focus on U.S., plans for global expansion. Aims to develop enhanced analytics solutions for measurable business growth.

data.title: Melania Trump Says Barron Was Blocked From Opening A Bank Account, Pointing To 'Cancel Culture'
This Coin Is The 'Middle Child Of Crypto' And Will Make A Strong Comeback In 2025 As 'Contrarian Play,' Says Bitwise CIO
data.description: A leading industry expert predicts a resurgence for Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) in 2025, as does Bitwise Chief Investment Officer Matt Hougan, who sees the second-biggest crypto as a “contrarian play.”

data.title: SoundHound Brings AI Voice Assistant To Another Stellantis Brand: What's Going On With The Stock?
data.description: SoundHound AI Inc (NASDAQ:SOUN) shares are bouncing around in early trading. The company on Thursday announced the successful integration of its generative AI voice assistant in vehicles made by a subsidiary of Stellantis N.V. (NYSE:STLA) across Europe.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Injective Up More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Injective's (CRYPTO: INJ) price has risen 3.38% to $21.62. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 13.0% gain, moving from $19.02 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $52.62.
